question.question_text: What will the USD/JPY exchange rate be on 2026-03-27 (or the next available trading day)?

prediction.reasoning: For a one-day ahead forecast of USD/JPY, the best point estimate is the current rate (random walk assumption). USD/JPY has a typical daily volatility of roughly 0.5-0.7 JPY (annualized vol ~8-10%, daily ~0.5-0.6%). Using ~0.5 JPY as one standard deviation for the day: 50% CI covers ~±0.67 sigma (~±0.5), 80% CI covers ~±1.28 sigma (~±1.0), 90% CI covers ~±1.645 sigma (~±1.5). No strong directional catalyst is evident that would shift the point estimate away from the current rate.
